raw_output:
The public_clone inspection failed. Per vision policy, the verdict must remain inconclusive when inspection cannot be completed.

{"summary":"Adds mastra-axi to community catalog (catalog.yaml, README.md, docs/index.html).","product_implications":"Community catalog addition requiring owner attention; vision mandates independent source review of the proposed package before any positive admission verdict can be issued.","recommended_action":"hold","recommended_reason":"Vision requires independent source review of mastra-axi at an exact pinned revision before a positive admission verdict. The sanctioned public_clone inspection failed with a provenance-recording error and cannot be completed. Per vision.md: 'If the required pinned source inspection cannot be completed…the verdict must remain inconclusive or request the missing evidence rather than recommend admission.' Contributor assertions in the PR body are explicitly insufficient under vision policy.","evidence":"target.txt: 'Added mastra-axi to catalog.yaml community section with repository URL, author, domain, and description' | target.txt: 'Low: Documentation-only change adding a single catalog entry' | vision.md: 'Every new package proposed for either catalog may receive a positive admission verdict only after independent source review of the package itself.' | vision.md: 'Contributor assertions, pasted transcripts or other contributor-provided verification, generated diffs, package metadata, or existence checks are insufficient evidence on their own.'","vision_evidence":{"target_owner":"kunchenguid","target_repo":"axi","target_number":101,"target_facts_sha256":"fd324129199534f0840b4f45695b6ce270f384e1eb5d910c03a428587ffb5a69","vision_sha":"677868815e8efa80b9e12fbee9a4ea842d68e912","vision_content_sha256":"6f39507c07a20615d733eb0a13a088fb3d62e56701d3d7ae3b6229b08394fa4e","base_sha":"e5f198e5d34d0d08442c3e9df0b055ecc06e968a","target_head_sha":"58d2967c382a6ee9529cf5b14a99ae2370fb87aa","applicable_criteria":[{"id":"catalog-community-welcome","quote":"Contributions adding real, verifiable AXIs to the community catalog are welcome.","external_source_required":true},{"id":"catalog-source-review-required","quote":"Every new package proposed for either catalog may receive a positive admission verdict only after independent source review of the package itself.","external_source_required":true}]},"automerge":{"behavior_class":"A","changes_existing_or_default_behavior":false,"optin_default_off":true,"aligns_with_vision":false,"recommend_merge":false,"external_source_required":true}}

raw_output: {"summary":"Adds opt-in forge_profiles config to route per-repository gh/glab identity via isolated CLI config dirs, propagated immutably across all subprocesses with fail-closed provider activation and exact legacy behavior when unconfigured.","product_implications":"Owner discussion warranted: this is a meaningful new feature with broad code surface (new packages forgecontext and runenv, changes across agent, pipeline, daemon, git, scm). Backward compatibility is carefully preserved - installs without forge_profiles see zero behavioral change. The fail-closed provider activation policy (once a GitHub profile is configured, unmatched GitHub repos error rather than fall through to ambient behavior) is a deliberate security decision the owner should explicitly validate matches their intent.","recommended_action":"merge","recommended_reason":"Well-structured, backward-compatible opt-in feature. The no-profiles early return (forgecontext.Resolve line 32) preserves exact legacy behavior with zero overhead. Comprehensive tests cover runenv overlay, forgecontext resolution, config validation and normalization, agent env propagation, managed-server env isolation, daemon recovery re-resolution, concurrent-run isolation, and CI reconciliation with recovered forge environment. Fail-closed design for activated providers aligns with vision's refusal-path strengthening; credentials are never persisted in DB and recovery re-resolves from current global config.","evidence":"target.txt PR body: 'fail closed without changing installations that define no profiles'; target.txt diff context.go: 'if len(profiles) == 0 { return nil, nil }'; target.txt global-config.md diff: 'With no forge_profiles, provider detection and ambient CLI authentication behave exactly as before'; target-src runenv/overlay.go: 'A nil base uses the current process environment. The input slice is never modified.'","vision_evidence":{"target_owner":"kunchenguid","target_repo":"no-mistakes","target_number":548,"target_facts_sha256":"4623ae31e830845bc3d59bae176f7d0346abd324fcb298002f448d4866908089","vision_sha":"08077197b28d5f6b5b74b405d4617f066f620e33","vision_content_sha256":"be04f798e4e616390c87a7fd21db7a3f656a4a7077b897c6a8aeb5cb49721b43","base_sha":"3d4691aedba97d9f877c073e3e652a8fde69d574","target_head_sha":"87905de0dd9c4f242ee2b26a148c2ec15cb5d877","applicable_criteria":[]},"automerge":{"behavior_class":"C","changes_existing_or_default_behavior":false,"optin_default_off":true,"aligns_with_vision":false,"recommend_merge":false,"external_source_required":false}}

raw_output:
I have all the information needed. The vision.md is a prose document with no `wheelhouse-vision-source-dependencies` declaration, which means VISION alignment cannot be confirmed.

{"summary":"Renames CopyLocalUserIdentity to CopyEffectiveUserIdentity and drops --local from the git config read so daemon-created worktrees inherit the repository's effective git identity, including includeIf-conditional configuration.","product_implications":"Routine fix: daemon commits will now correctly carry the user's effective git identity when that identity is set via includeIf gitdir: rather than repo-local config. Users with explicit --local config are unaffected. This closes a gap noted in kunchenguid/no-mistakes#521 (git-authorship half).","recommended_action":"hold","recommended_reason":"The change is technically correct, narrow, and well-tested (local-config case preserved, new includeIf case covered, concurrency regression retained). However, vision.md contains no wheelhouse-vision-source-dependencies declaration, so the VISION alignment verdict cannot be confirmed per policy. Maintainer should explicitly approve automerge eligibility.","evidence":"target.txt PR body: 'drops --local so worktrees inherit the source repo\\'s effective (includeIf-aware) git identity, preserving prior behavior when local config is set'; git.go:482: 'Run(ctx, srcDir, \"config\", \"--get\", \"--default\", \"\", key)'; manager.go:651: 'git.CopyEffectiveUserIdentity(ctx, repo.WorkingPath, wtDir)'; git_test.go:185: 'CopyEffectiveUserIdentity(ctx, src, dst)'","vision_evidence":{"target_owner":"kunchenguid","target_repo":"no-mistakes","target_number":547,"target_facts_sha256":"c8308310c07e85d840ea41785f78786a04d181bcf25c1b2ae6dbe4db278f6ea9","vision_sha":"08077197b28d5f6b5b74b405d4617f066f620e33","vision_content_sha256":"be04f798e4e616390c87a7fd21db7a3f656a4a7077b897c6a8aeb5cb49721b43","base_sha":"3d4691aedba97d9f877c073e3e652a8fde69d574","target_head_sha":"0f29152c44b808064f9a2a2621c9bde6456f6262","applicable_criteria":[]},"automerge":{"behavior_class":"B","changes_existing_or_default_behavior":true,"optin_default_off":false,"aligns_with_vision":false,"recommend_merge":false,"external_source_required":false}}

raw_output: {"summary":"Adds CSS responsive layout fixes to docs/index.html to prevent horizontal overflow and reflow catalog tables on mobile viewports, with no changes to AXI principles, catalog, SDK, or any other file.","product_implications":"Routine docs site improvement; affects only visual presentation at narrow viewport widths. No AXI principles, catalog entries, or SDK code are touched. Desktop layout is unchanged.","recommended_action":"merge","recommended_reason":"Single-file, CSS-only change scoped to docs/index.html. Fixes mobile overflow by setting min-width:0 on grid items, adds breakpoint-scoped chart and copy-button reflows, and stacks catalog tables via .table-catalog class while explicitly preserving the Results table layout. The 17,084px desktop height guard is documented as verified. No vision-governed area (principles, catalog, SDK) is touched. VISION alignment cannot be auto-confirmed because vision.md contains no wheelhouse-vision-source-dependencies declaration.","evidence":"target-facts.json paths:[\"docs/index.html\"] (1 file, CSS+class only); diff comment: \"Scoped by .table-catalog, which is on those two tables only. Not by .card .table-wrap .table\"; target.txt: \"The change is page-local, well bounded\"; vision.md: \"Small, objective corrections that improve clarity without changing meaning or behavior are welcome.\"","vision_evidence":{"target_owner":"kunchenguid","target_repo":"axi","target_number":109,"target_facts_sha256":"a3faf5a5ca23cc1ca0d92b85ca024fdeaa0b9e1dbd290c433b529e22307ebebf","vision_sha":"677868815e8efa80b9e12fbee9a4ea842d68e912","vision_content_sha256":"6f39507c07a20615d733eb0a13a088fb3d62e56701d3d7ae3b6229b08394fa4e","base_sha":"e5f198e5d34d0d08442c3e9df0b055ecc06e968a","target_head_sha":"86c95cafaf781b95728629b2781d6fc9c873ccb7","applicable_criteria":[]},"automerge":{"behavior_class":"A","changes_existing_or_default_behavior":false,"optin_default_off":false,"aligns_with_vision":false,"recommend_merge":false,"external_source_required":false}}

{"summary":"Adds compactGHChecksDiagnostic to GetChecks error path in github.go, surfacing a bounded (200-byte), safeurl-redacted, UTF-8-safe first-line CLI diagnostic in the operator-visible CI polling warning.","product_implications":"Operator-visible CI warning format changes on gh pr checks failure-error message gains a safe diagnostic suffix when CLI output is non-empty; CI gate decisions, polling logic, and authorization are unchanged. Routine observability fix with no behavioral risk to CI gates, though lint pipeline exited with code 2 (unspecified issue).","recommended_action":"request-changes","recommended_reason":"Lint pipeline exited with code 2 (linter found issues, details not provided); this should be resolved before merge. The two rebase test failures are pre-existing, confirmed independent of this diff, and explicitly out of scope per intent. The core change is sound: credential-redacted, bounded, UTF-8-safe diagnostic is correctly wired, ExitError is preserved via %w wrapping, and the no-checks-reported exception is untouched.","evidence":"target.txt: \"The diagnostic must use safeurl redaction, be bounded and UTF-8 safe, use the first useful non-empty line\"; github.go:311: `if diagnostic := compactGHChecksDiagnostic(out); diagnostic != \"\" { return nil, fmt.Errorf(\"gh pr checks: %w: %s\", err, diagnostic) }`; safeurl/redact.go:26: `func RedactText(text string) string { return httpURLPattern.ReplaceAllStringFunc(text, Redact) }`; ci_mergeable_test.go:348: `if strings.Contains(joinedLogs, \"secret\") { t.Fatalf(\"CI logs exposed credential: %q\", joinedLogs) }`","vision_evidence":{"target_owner":"kunchenguid","target_repo":"no-mistakes","target_number":549,"target_facts_sha256":"5aa137656dfbef1ea33fa0432421ef69a84810dc28f121030e3aead163b23994","vision_sha":"08077197b28d5f6b5b74b405d4617f066f620e33","vision_content_sha256":"be04f798e4e616390c87a7fd21db7a3f656a4a7077b897c6a8aeb5cb49721b43","base_sha":"3d4691aedba97d9f877c073e3e652a8fde69d574","target_head_sha":"a11e044816795963f9a8c1cc980afb2b436e5dc0","applicable_criteria":[]},"automerge":{"behavior_class":"B","changes_existing_or_default_behavior":true,"optin_default_off":false,"aligns_with_vision":false,"recommend_merge":false,"external_source_required":false}}

raw_output: {"summary":"Adds RunCIMonitorInterrupted terminal status and crash-recovery path so daemon restarts no longer fail runs that were actively monitoring CI for an already-created PR, and centralises all terminal-status enumerations through a new Terminal() helper.","product_implications":"Owner discussion: daemon startup RecoverStaleRuns now distinguishes a mid-CI-monitor crash (PR preserved as ci_monitor_interrupted, CI step skipped) from a mid-pipeline crash (run failed as before). All five surfaces-types, db, daemon worktree cleanup, branchsync, axi drive CLI, and TUI-are updated consistently. The Terminal() helper eliminates four separate inline switch enumerations, closing a drift risk the PR description explicitly acknowledges. Worktree preservation for CI-interrupted runs adds a safety hold when the checkout may contain an unpushed CI auto-fix commit; matching-HEAD worktrees are reclaimed immediately. The pipeline-review 'info still open' about app.go:84 is resolved in the final head: target-src/internal/tui/app.go:84 already reads run.Status.Terminal().","recommended_action":"merge","recommended_reason":"Well-scoped corrective bug fix: daemon restart was silently failing runs with an open PR, violating the vision's never-lose-work principle. Core recovery logic is exercised by three db-layer tests, two daemon integration tests (one booting a real daemon), and focused CLI/TUI evidence tests; Terminal() centralisation is pinned by a dedicated types test and a NewModel round-trip test. Branchsync terminalRunStatus drift (pipeline-review warning 2) and app.go done-flag drift (warning 3) are both resolved in the submitted head. Remaining worktree-leak concern (pipeline-review warning 1) is mitigated: worktrees are reclaimed when HEAD matches the pushed SHA; only the unpushed-commit window is preserved, consistent with the no-lose-work principle.","evidence":"{\"q1_target_exact\":\"fix preserves the open PR when the daemon restarts during CI monitoring (issue #361)\",\"q2_target\":\"RecoverStaleRuns now recovers a run interrupted mid-CI-monitor with an already-open PR as the non-failure\",\"q3_vision\":\"The first law is that the tool must not lose people's code\",\"q4_vision\":\"Work the pipeline holds must always have a safe path back into the user's custody, even after a crash\"}","vision_evidence":{"target_owner":"kunchenguid","target_repo":"no-mistakes","target_number":374,"target_facts_sha256":"c97b51c622a76fca4bdd376f6103291c4ec8f93fa6c1b525e698c0d4735a83e6","vision_sha":"08077197b28d5f6b5b74b405d4617f066f620e33","vision_content_sha256":"be04f798e4e616390c87a7fd21db7a3f656a4a7077b897c6a8aeb5cb49721b43","base_sha":"3d4691aedba97d9f877c073e3e652a8fde69d574","target_head_sha":"c5da842c7eabd2d8f2f9f8f31e54b1672a341347","applicable_criteria":[]},"automerge":{"behavior_class":"B","changes_existing_or_default_behavior":true,"optin_default_off":false,"aligns_with_vision":false,"recommend_merge":false,"external_source_required":false}}
target_excerpt: fix preserves the open PR when the daemon restarts during CI monitoring (issue #361)
